MSc and PhD opportunities

Clear entry points for students and collaborators.

Open topics, research challenges and collaboration briefings are exposed through a dedicated module so candidates and partner institutions can navigate them quickly.

Thesis topic

AI for medical workflow automation

Explore robust models for clinical imaging and document-heavy health processes.

Research challenge

Semantic map of MLKD publications

Cluster topics over time and expose them through an interactive graph.

Collaboration

Industry-facing research briefs

Transform technical papers into short summaries for partners and grants.
